title: stipa pennata var. iberica
intro: Stipa pennata var. iberica, also known as Iberian feather grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to have potential health benefits such as reducing stress and improving digestion. The plant's medicinal properties are often prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to soothe anxiety and promote relaxation. Additionally, the plant's extracts have been studied for their potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health.
